stories.title: Skubal's Dominant Rehab Start — Return Could Come June 14

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Tarik Skubal in his rehab start Sunday: 5 IP, 0 ER, 2 H, 6 K, 0 BB, 54 pitches, 16 swings-and-misses. Two-time Cy Young winner looks completely healthy. Target return: June 14 at Cleveland. #Tigers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: The Tigers went 6-21 without Skubal. He makes his rehab start look that easy, and now he's days away from returning. Free agent after this season too — every contender is paying very close attention. #MLB #Tigers

research.facts:
Skubal Dominant Rehab Start — Return June 14
**Sources:**
- Detroit News: "Tarik Skubal, Detroit Tigers ace, makes 1st rehab start: How he fared" (June 7, 2026)
- SI.com: "Tarik Skubal's Razor-Sharp Injury Rehab Performance Turns West Michigan into Circus"
- Detroit News: "Tarik Skubal's rehab start with Whitecaps: Everything you need to know" (June 5, 2026)
- Grand Haven Tribune: "Skubal Sunday: Tarik Skubal brings big-league buzz to West Michigan"
- Bleacher Report: "Tarik Skubal Injury Updates on Timeline for Return to Tigers Amid MLB Trade Rumors"
**Key Confirmed Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- June 7 rehab start: West Michigan Whitecaps (High-A), 5 innings, 0 runs, 2 hits, 6 Ks, 0 BB, 54 pitches (44 strikes), 16 swings-and-misses — HIGH (Detroit News, SI confirmed)
- NanoScope arthroscopic surgery on left elbow: May 6, 2026 — HIGH (multiple sources)
- Target return: June 14 at Cleveland — HIGH (from June 7 pipeline; consistent with "one rehab start needed" reporting)
- Tigers record without Skubal: 6-21 — HIGH (prior pipeline, consistent with reporting)
- Skubal is a two-time American League Cy Young Award winner — HIGH
- Skubal is a free agent after the 2026 season — HIGH (from prior pipeline)

stories.title: Glasnow to 60-Day IL — Dodgers Navigating Two-Ace Absence

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Tyler Glasnow moved to the 60-day IL. Back injury. Not cleared to throw. Earliest return: July 6. The Dodgers now have Glasnow AND Blake Snell both out of the rotation. Ohtani is carrying this team. #Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Manager Dave Roberts on Glasnow: "The body is not allowing for it." Dodgers are 42-23 despite losing two of their top starters. When does this catch up with them? #Dodgers #MLB

research.facts:
Glasnow 60-Day IL
**Sources:**
- MLB Trade Rumors: "Dodgers Move Tyler Glasnow To 60-Day IL, Add Nick Frasso" (June 6, 2026)
- ESPN: "Dodgers move Tyler Glasnow to 60-day IL with back injury" (June 6, 2026)
- Dodger Blue: "Dodgers Make Trade With Cubs, Add Nick Frasso To 40-Man Roster & Put Tyler Glasnow On 60-Day IL" (June 6, 2026)
- Washington Post: "Dodgers pitcher Tyler Glasnow moved to 60-day IL with back injury" (June 6, 2026)
**Key Confirmed Facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Glasnow moved from 15-day to 60-day IL with back injury — HIGH (multiple sources)
- Back issue began around May 8 — HIGH
- Not cleared for throwing program as of reporting — HIGH
- Manager Dave Roberts quote: "I think he wants to get cranking again, but then the doctors just are not allowing for it and the body is not allowing for it" — HIGH (ESPN/multiple)
- Earliest return eligibility: July 6 — HIGH
- Dodgers added Nick Frasso to 40-man roster (staying in Triple-A) — HIGH
- Dodgers traded Antoine Kelly to Cubs — HIGH (Dodger Blue)
- Blake Snell: Also on IL after bone spur surgery (prior pipeline, confirmed May 27 entry) — HIGH
- Dodgers record: approximately 42-23 — HIGH (per standings search June 8 showing 42-23 Dodgers)

stories.title: Judge's Trade Deadline Question — Will He Be Back by August 3?

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Aaron Judge's rib fracture: 4-6 week timeline. Six weeks from June 6 = July 18 return. The trade deadline is August 3. If he has any setback, the Yankees are making one of the biggest decisions in franchise history without their MVP. #Yankees #MLB

- Schwarber: at least 22 HRs entering this week — HIGH (per June 5/6 pipeline entries cross-confirmed with search)
- 60-HR club: only Bonds (73), McGwire (70, 65), and Sosa (66, 64, 63) have hit 60+ HRs in a single season — HIGH
- Judge: on IL with rib fracture since June 6 — HIGH
- Murakami: on IL with Grade 2 hamstring since approximately May 31 — HIGH
- Schwarber pace context: on pace for 54+ HRs — MEDIUM (based on 22 HR in ~66 games; pace varies)
- 20 HRs on May 15: earliest date to reach 20 HRs in MLB history — HIGH (per prior pipeline, confirmed multiple sources)
